headline: Reflecting On Hospital Chains Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA)
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how hospital chains stocks fared in Q4, starting with HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA).
